welcome.headline: Book anything, anytime
welcome.subtitle: Find and book appointments with top-rated professionals.
welcome.legalFootnote: By continuing, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.

phone.title: Enter your number
phone.subtitle: We'll text you a 6-digit code.
phone.nameHint: Shown to providers when you book.
phone.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.

otp.title: Enter verification code
otp.devBannerBody: OTP is sent server-side — check backend logs for the code.
otp.errorInvalid: Enter the 6 digits from your code.
otp.errorMismatch: That code doesn't match — please try again.
otp.errorExpired: This code has expired. Request a new one.
otp.errorMissing: No pending code for this number. Request a new one.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to your library
signIn.errorInvalid: Enter a valid email and an 8+ character password.
signIn.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
